description: You are an SRE resolving a disk space issue where high-resolution web traffic metrics are causing storage bloat. Update the storage schemas in /opt/graphite/conf/storage-schemas.conf inside the graphite Docker container by adding a [web_traffic] section with the pattern ^servers\.web_traffic\..* and retentions 1m:7d, 10m:30d. Resize the existing metric databases at /opt/graphite/storage/whisper/servers/web_traffic/speed_sensor_1.wsp and /opt/graphite/storage/whisper/servers/web_traffic/speed_sensor_2.wsp to match the new retention schema while preserving all historical data.
